note: Golden set for the compaction benchmark. must_have = signatures that MUST survive compaction (recall gate). qa = questions answerable from the docs (LLM-judge). lookup = the grep-tier lines doc-indexer would emit.

qa.q: In Pydantic v2, how do you convert a model instance to a dict, and what is the deprecated v1 method?
qa.reference: Use model.model_dump() (and model_dump_json() for a JSON string). The v1 .dict()/.json() methods are deprecated/removed in v2.

qa.q: How do you write a field validator in Pydantic v2?
qa.reference: Use the @field_validator("field", mode="after") decorator on a @classmethod that returns the (possibly transformed) value. The v1 @validator is replaced by @field_validator and must be a classmethod.

qa.q: How do you validate data against a non-model type like list[int] in Pydantic v2?
How do you make a Pydantic model reject unknown fields?

lookup: pydantic | BaseModel | base class for validated models
pydantic | Field(default, alias, gt, lt, min_length, max_length, pattern) | field constraints/metadata
pydantic | ConfigDict(extra='forbid', frozen, populate_by_name) | model config
